---
title: "Seurat introduction"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratData)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
# view the availble data in SeuratData
# View(AvailableData())
SeuratData::InstallData("pbmc3k")
data("pbmc3k")

# load in raw pbmc3k data
pbmc3k <- LoadData("pbmc3k", type = "raw")

# extract counts layer from pbmc3k to mimic a scenario building a Seurat object starting from scratch
pbmc3k.counts <- pbmc3k[["RNA"]]$counts
pbmc3k.meta <- pbmc3k@meta.data
```

```{r}
# View counts
pbmc3k.counts

# View metadata
pbmc3k.meta
```
